text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Grand Concert used to be an<n>annual
performance organized by the<n>students
themselves, where every<n>one of them got the
chance to sing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But those days are long gone, and<n>despite Light
Hello's pleas to bring it<n>back, the URA seems
convinced that<n>demand for a reboot simply isn't
there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her vision—creating a space where all<n>students
can convey their gratitude<n>through song—does find
a<n>sympathizer in Smart Falcon, who<n>asks to help
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to hold a promo concert to<n>get the word
out and hopefully attract<n>supporters. The Grand
Concert<n>Reboot Project is officially underway!
